title: Easter Sunday Sunrise Service
description: Come celebrate the resurrection of our Savior! Join us for a special sunrise service (outside weather permitting) with coffee, iced coffee and donuts being served following the service! Followed by morning worship at 10:45 AM. An Easter egg hunt for the children will follow immediately after the service.
location: Victory Baptist Church - 295 Pleasant View Drive, Kittanning, PA 16201
